key_themes: Strong earnings growth and beats in Q4 2025
Revenue momentum from defense and commercial contracts
summary: Gilat Satellite Networks (GILT) demonstrated robust performance in its Q4 2025 earnings, beating EPS and revenue estimates with 75% YoY revenue growth to $137M and full-year revenue up 48% to $452M, driven by defense wins and commercial expansions like in-flight connectivity. Analysts maintain a strong buy rating with a $19-20 price target, projecting 91% EPS growth in 2026, though recent shareholder dilution from capital raises poses a minor risk. Overall sentiment is optimistic ahead of Q1 earnings on May 13, 2026.
